subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1914-11-22
subcodes.first_line: Much that is written or said about Muhammad is pure fabrication. The reality is not stated, because it is misunderstood. The origin of the current opinion
subcodes.subjects: @rejection of Muhammad, @stories; anecdotes, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @episodes from the early history of Islam, @suffering; rejection of Christ
